title: Folder Index
description: Generated from README.md under any docs/ folder (see folder_kind_map.json rule readme_index). Includes full raw_markdown plus navigation_tables, links, and enriched sections for tooling.

era_index.description: Era number 0-10 when folder name starts with 'N. '; null for non-era folders

summary.description: Optional short summary extracted from README

children.description: Sibling JSON files in the same folder (refreshed by generate_indexes.py)

navigation_tables.description: GFM tables extracted from README body

links.description: Markdown links extracted from README body

sections.description: Heading-split sections with tables, lists, code, links (same shape as hub/document)
